# Levofloxacin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Levofloxacin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Levofloxacin</strong> 目前有 <strong>24 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Levofloxacin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Quinsair is indicated for the management of chronic pulmonary infections due to Pseudomonas aeruginosa in adult patients with cystic fibrosis. Consideration should be given to official guidance on...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>punctate epithelial keratoconjunctivitis（99.9%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（99.8%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（99.8%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（99.8%）</li>
<li>septicemic plague（99.8%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>post-infectious syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>postinfectious vasculitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>otitis externa（99.7%）</li>
<li>post-bacterial disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>infective urethral stricture（99.7%）</li>
<li>infection-related hemolytic uremic syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>Chagas cardiomyopathy（99.7%）</li>
<li>exposure keratitis（99.6%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（99.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/levofloxacin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
